input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.1.1
            TITLE: only electrical motors are allowed.  the number of motors is not limited.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.1.1: Only electrical motors are allowed.  The number of motors is not limited.
EV.4.1.1 Only electrical motors are allowed.  The number of motors is not limited.

final_answer: Only electrical motors are allowed. The number of motors is not limited.
